patch.value: Extract shared test item factories for command specs

Duplicate audit 2026-05-22: many command specs copy a createTask/createSeedItem helper that shells through pm create with the same long flag list, then extracts json.item.id. The widened duplicate scan found the same 10-line create sequence across at least 9 files including tests/integration/task-lifecycle-aliases.spec.ts:5, tests/unit/comments-command.spec.ts:16, tests/unit/close-command.spec.ts, tests/unit/restore-command.spec.ts, tests/unit/delete-command.spec.ts, tests/unit/beads-command.spec.ts, tests/unit/notes-learnings-command.spec.ts, tests/unit/validate-command.spec.ts, and tests/unit/test-command.spec.ts. This is distinct from pm-7rlp, which targets test runtime performance and CI matrix duplication rather than fixture boilerplate. Fix by adding a shared tests/helper item factory with overridable title/type/status/metadata defaults and migrating repeated local helpers where that does not hide test intent.

Shared test helper covers common create-item setup with explicit overrides; repeated long createTask/createSeedItem blocks are removed from affected specs; migrated tests still make command-specific setup obvious; targeted unit/integration specs and pnpm build pass.

value.author: codex-duplicate-audit
value.text: Duplicate-check evidence: searched tracker for createTask helper and repeated create item test duplication. No open item covers this fixture clone; pm-7rlp covers runner/CI performance only. Scan found 9 files with identical create flag windows.
